Bash(cat >> /Users/adityatiwari/Adpilot/prisma/schema.prisma << 'PRISMA'

model TeamInvite {
  id        String    @id @default\(uuid\(\)\)
  teamId    String    @map\("team_id"\)
  email     String
  role      String    @default\("member"\)
  token     String    @unique
  expiresAt DateTime  @map\("expires_at"\)
  usedAt    DateTime? @map\("used_at"\)
  createdAt DateTime  @default\(now\(\)\) @map\("created_at"\)

  team Team @relation\(fields: [teamId], references: [id]\)

  @@index\([teamId, email]\)
  @@index\([token]\)
  @@map\("team_invites"\)
}

model AuditLog {
  id         String   @id @default\(uuid\(\)\)
  teamId     String   @map\("team_id"\)
  userId     String?  @map\("user_id"\)
  action     String
  resource   String
  resourceId String?  @map\("resource_id"\)
  metadata   Json     @default\("{}"\) @db.JsonB
  ipAddress  String?  @map\("ip_address"\)
  userAgent  String?  @map\("user_agent"\)
  createdAt  DateTime @default\(now\(\)\) @map\("created_at"\)

  team Team @relation\(fields: [teamId], references: [id]\)

  @@index\([teamId, createdAt]\)
  @@index\([userId, createdAt]\)
  @@map\("audit_logs"\)
}
PRISMA
echo "Schema appended")

feat\(seo\): Phase 1 + Phase 4 — re-enable v2 engine, implement LLM executive summary

Phase 1:
- Re-confirm SEO_ENGINE_V2=true in .env \(had silently reverted to false\)
- All v2 engine safeguards already in place \(timeouts, try/finally, fallbacks\)

Phase 4 \(SeoSummaryService\):
- Add @anthropic-ai/sdk dependency
- Create SeoSummaryService.js — Claude API, 3-attempt retry, exponential backoff
- Gates: SEO_SUMMARY_ENABLED env flag + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + plan limits.summaryEnabled
- AuditOrchestrator: replace TODO stub with real SeoSummaryService.generate\(\) call
- Store summary as JSON.stringify'd string in TEXT column; _parseSummary\(\) in controller
- SeoPage.jsx: ExecutiveSummaryPanel \(paragraphs + priority roadmap with effort badges
  + business impact warning card\) rendered at top of AuditResultPanel when available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(seo\): Phase 2 — expanded rules, scoring bonuses, robots.txt path filtering, frontend actions

Rules \(registry: 16 → 23\):
- ViewportRule: missing_viewport \(high\)
- SecurityHeadersRule: x-frame-options / x-content-type / HSTS \(medium/low\)
- HeadingHierarchyRule: heading_hierarchy_skip \(medium\)
- OpenGraphRule: missing_open_graph \(low\)
- SchemaMarkupRule: missing_schema_markup \(low\)
- ImageDimensionsRule: images_missing_dimensions \(low\)
- LazyLoadingRule: no_image_lazy_loading \(low\)

PuppeteerAdapter: 4 new page fields
- responseHeaders \(security-relevant subset\)
- headingStructure \(ordered tag names, capped 50\)
- imagesMissingDimensions \(count\)
- hasLazyImages \(boolean\)
- Moved script/style removal AFTER image+heading extraction

ScoringEngine:
- perfMetrics 4th param for per-metric bonus checks
- +5 HTTPS bonus, +5 Schema bonus, +3 fast LCP, +3 good CLS
- Grade D boundary: 45 → 40

CrawlEngine:
- _parseRobots\(\) returns disallowedPaths[] \(not just blocksCrawl flag\)
- _isRobotsDisallowed\(\) path-prefix matching during BFS
- BFS skips robots-disallowed URLs before queuing

Frontend \(SeoPage.jsx\):
- Export PDF button \(Printer icon\) — visible when audit completed
- Re-run audit button \(RefreshCw icon\) — triggers useMutation POST /seo/audit
- Inline confirmation strip with Cancel / Confirm Re-run
- onRerun prop auto-switches panel to new auditId

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Phase A/B/C — ContentBrief AI, auth password reset, notifications, toast system

Phase A — ContentBrief:
- OpenAI gpt-4o-mini integration with TF-IDF fallback in ContentBriefService
- BriefDetailModal: expandable outline accordion, related keyword chips, copy brief, delete
- GenerateBriefModal: animated AI loading skeleton state
- Enhanced brief cards: searchIntent badge, section count, group-hover trash icon
- DELETE /api/v1/seo/briefs/:id backend route

Phase B — Auth:
- Prisma migration: passwordResetToken + passwordResetExpiry on User
- authService: forgotPassword \(token gen + email\) + resetPassword \(verify + update\)
- EmailService: sendPasswordReset method + HTML template
- POST /auth/forgot-password + /auth/reset-password routes
- LoginPage: wire handleForgot to API \(was stub\), loading state
- Register: auto-login on success, redirect to /dashboard

Phase C — Notifications + UX:
- GET /api/v1/notifications + PATCH /notifications/read-all backend
- TopBar: live notification bell with unread count badge + dropdown \(30s poll, mark-all-read\)
- Toast system: custom ToastProvider + useToast hook \(slide-in animation, 4 types\)
- Dashboard: "Create Campaign" CTA button on empty state
- CampaignsPage: replace window.confirm with ConfirmDialog component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

feat: Phase C complete — full UI/UX polish, new pages, notifications, settings

  password, strength indicator, 2FA placeholder\), Notifications \(preference toggles\),
  Danger Zone \(export data, delete account with email confirmation\)
C7 Rules: already fully implemented ✅
C8 Integrations: already fully implemented ✅
C9 Team: already fully implemented ✅
C10 Analytics: date range filter \(7d/30d/90d\), CSV export button
